scripts.test: python -c "import shutil;shutil.rmtree('.tmp-test', ignore_errors=True)" && tsc --module ESNext --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --moduleResolution bundler --outDir .tmp-test src/lib/exportMarkdown.ts src/lib/exportMarkdown.test.ts src/lib/dataApi.regression.test.ts src/features/newResearch/noteTypeOptions.ts src/features/newResearch/noteTypeOptions.test.ts src/hooks/metadataLists.ts src/hooks/metadataLists.test.ts src/features/files/unsavedIndicators.ts src/features/folders/unsavedFolders.ts src/features/files/unsavedIndicators.test.ts src/types/models.ts && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --test .tmp-test/lib/exportMarkdown.test.js .tmp-test/lib/dataApi.regression.test.js .tmp-test/features/newResearch/noteTypeOptions.test.js .tmp-test/hooks/metadataLists.test.js .tmp-test/features/files/unsavedIndicators.test.js
